name: Container API Credential Access - Kubernetes Secrets and Docker Env
description: Detects container credential access via kubectl get secrets, docker inspect, ServiceAccount token reads, etcd direct access, and /proc/*/environ extraction.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name == "kubectl" and process.args : "*secret*") or (process.name == "docker" and process.args : "inspect") or process.args : ("*/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io*", "*serviceaccount/token*", "*etcdctl*", "*/proc/1/environ*", "*/proc/self/environ*"))
